- Where is he?

- In the yard. He _____ the ducks. He _____ them for ten minutes. (feed, feed)
There is a nice pond in the park. He often _____ to the park and _____ the ducks. (go, feed)
When I _____ him in the park yesterday he _____ the ducks. (see, feed)
He is in the park. As soon as he _____ the ducks he _____ home. (feed, go)
She said he _____ the ducks the next day. (feed)
